creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
I think we can reasonably assume that this is overcome by events, for everyone who might have been affected. 


(In reply to elimelech007 from comment #0)

Thank you for reporting. 

For future ports-related reports: a suitable prefix, in the summary line, should ensure automated assignment to the appropriate person or list. 

(For Bugzilla purposes, this was not a standards issue.)

Hint: at the head of the FreshPorts page for a port, use the two bug icons.
